steps.text: Let's write some animal names! Find cow and trace it!
steps.feedback: Cow! Short and simple — three letters. Now find dog!
Dog! Your fingers know that one well. Now find duck!
Duck! Four letters — well done. Now find cat!
Cat! Three letters, just like cow. Last one — find horse!
Horse! Five letters — your longest word. You traced them all!

steps.text: These animals live in wild places far away. Let's write their names! Find lion and trace it!
steps.feedback: Lion! Four letters for a mighty animal. Now find tiger!
Tiger! Five letters — and very stripy. Now find zebra!
Zebra! Five letters with a Z — rare letter! Now find camel!
Camel! Five letters — they live in the desert. Last one — find turtle!
Turtle! Six letters — your longest yet. You wrote them all!

steps.text: Feelings have names — and now we're going to write them! Find sad and trace it!
steps.feedback: Sad. Three letters. Everyone feels sad sometimes. Now find shy!
Shy! Just three letters — a quiet little word. Now find smile!
Smile! Five letters and a happy feeling. Now find angry!
Angry. Five letters for a big feeling. Last one — find worried!
Worried! Seven letters — your biggest word today. You wrote them all!

steps.text: Yum! Let's write the names of some fruits. Find apple and trace it!
steps.feedback: Apple! Five letters — starts with a. Now find pear!
Pear! Four letters — shaped like a teardrop. Now find kiwi!
Kiwi! Four letters — green and tangy inside. Now find mango!
Mango! Five letters — sweet and orange inside. Last one — find lemon!
Lemon! Five letters — very sour! You wrote them all!

steps.text: Vroom! Let's write the names of things that go! Find bus and trace it!
steps.feedback: Bus! Just three letters — short and fast. Now find train!
Train! Five letters — it travels on rails. Now find truck!
Truck! Five letters — carries heavy loads. Now find digger!
Digger! Six letters — scoops up earth. Last one — find tractor!
Tractor! Seven letters — your longest word. Vroom — you wrote them all!
